title: HOBBY LIFE 21 Litre Plastic No 3 Rattan Pedal Dustbin
features: Hobby Life Rattan Pedal Dustbin No: 3
Contains a removable bucket for easy emptying
Highest quality plastic material. Ideal for the kitchen or bathroom.
Available in White, Ivory, Dark Brown, Light Brown. A random colour from the stock held will be shipped. 21 Lt Capacity
description: Product Description This rattan design pedal bin is ideal for use in the kitchen, bathroom or anywhere else in the home. Made from the highest quality raw materials, it is a very durable and long lasting product. Also includes a removable bucket insert for easy and tidy emptying. Box Contains 1 x Hobby Life Rattan Design Pedal Bin No: 3 - 21 Lt
